query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM maintenanceRequests GROUP BY status;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_jobs, SUM(CASE WHEN assignedContractorId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('verified','paid','completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed FROM maintenanceRequests;
